description: A financial regulator has sent an inquiry requesting trade data for a specific time period.

nodes.task_description: Parse the regulator's request to identify the exact data and time period required.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the scope of the data request.

nodes.task_description: Query the trade database to pull all relevant trade records.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully extracts the requested trade data from the archive.

nodes.task_description: Format the data according to the regulator's specifications and submit it through the secure portal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent prepares and submits the data package to the regulator.
